skills.name: transition-narration-writer
skills.description: Writes short presenter or narrator lines that bridge two programme segments smoothly, carrying the audience from one topic, location, or interview to the next without jarring cuts.

skills.name: voice-over-script-writer
skills.description: Turns research notes, interview transcripts, or article text into a broadcast-ready voice-over script — short sentences, active voice, written for the ear, timed to picture.

skills.name: content-tags-writer
skills.description: Generates a complete, platform-appropriate set of tags and keywords for a video or article, optimised for discoverability without keyword stuffing.

skills.name: facebook-post-writer
skills.description: Writes a ready-to-publish Facebook post that drives clicks and shares for a news story, documentary, podcast episode, or video — matched to how Facebook audiences actually read and engage.

skills.name: instagram-post-writer
skills.description: Writes a complete Instagram caption — including hook, body, call to action, and hashtag set — for a news story, documentary, video, or editorial project, formatted for how Instagram audiences read and discover content.

skills.name: linkedin-post-writer
skills.description: Writes a professional LinkedIn post that frames a published article, investigation, or media project as a thought-leadership moment — driving clicks while positioning the author as a credible voice in their field.

skills.name: newsletter-blurb-writer
skills.description: Writes a short, punchy newsletter blurb — the 60–120-word teaser entry that introduces one story inside a curated email digest, giving subscribers just enough to decide whether to click through.

skills.name: newsletter-subject-line-writer
skills.description: Writes five subject line options for a newsletter edition — each using a different opening strategy — so you can choose the one that fits your audience, tone, and what the edition actually delivers.

skills.name: push-notification-writer
skills.description: Writes concise, high-urgency push notification text for a news story — optimised for mobile lock screens where readers decide in under two seconds whether to tap or dismiss.

skills.name: seo-headline-variants-writer
skills.description: Produces five headline variants for a single article, each optimised for a different reader search intent — so editors can choose the version that best matches how their target audience actually searches for this topic.

skills.name: seo-meta-description-writer
skills.description: Writes a 150–160 character meta description for a web article, placing the primary keyword naturally within the first half of the sentence and ending with a clear reason to click.

skills.name: teaser-line-writer
skills.description: Generates a short, compelling teaser line — one or two sentences — that earns a click through genuine story value, not misleading hype.

skills.name: thumbnail-text-writer
skills.description: Generates short, bold text overlays — five words or fewer — for YouTube and social media video thumbnails that are readable at small sizes and convey the video's core hook at a glance.

skills.name: twitter-post-writer
skills.description: Writes a single, publication-ready post for X/Twitter — 280 characters maximum — in a clear journalistic voice that reports or contextualises a story without hollow engagement hooks.

skills.name: youtube-chapters-writer
skills.description: Converts a video outline or rough transcript into a properly formatted YouTube chapter list with [HH:MM:SS] timestamps and punchy, click-navigable chapter titles.

skills.name: youtube-description-writer
skills.description: Writes a complete YouTube video description with the first two lines optimized for the search preview, followed by a structured body that serves both the algorithm and the viewer.

skills.name: youtube-title-writer
skills.description: Generates 5 YouTube title options for a single video, each 60–70 characters long, front-loading the hook word or primary keyword so it is visible before the title is cut off in search results.

skills.name: award-submission-writer
skills.description: Writes a compelling award submission entry that frames a piece of journalism or media work within a specific award category's criteria, highlighting impact, craft, and originality.

skills.name: collaboration-proposal-writer
skills.description: Writes a formal collaboration proposal addressed to another media outlet, broadcaster, production company, or independent producer, making the case for a specific joint project and structuring a clear offer of terms.

skills.name: editorial-decision-memo-writer
skills.description: Writes a clear internal memo that documents an editorial decision — why a story was published, held, killed, or significantly changed — so that the reasoning is on record for editors, legal teams, and senior leadership.

skills.name: festival-entry-synopsis-writer
skills.description: Writes a polished, submission-ready synopsis for a film, documentary, or media project entered into a festival or competition.

skills.name: journalism-grant-application-writer
skills.description: Writes a compelling grant application narrative for a journalism project, covering project description, public interest justification, methodology, and reporter credentials.

skills.name: management-briefing-writer
skills.description: Writes a clear, structured briefing note for editorial managers, department heads, or senior leadership on a specific editorial, operational, or strategic issue.

skills.name: media-advisory-writer
skills.description: Drafts a concise, correctly formatted media advisory that gives journalists everything they need to decide whether to cover an event, with all logistical details in a scannable layout.

skills.name: post-interview-thankyou-writer
skills.description: Drafts a brief, professionally warm thank-you email to send to an interview subject after a recorded or on-the-record conversation, keeping the relationship open for future contact.

skills.name: press-release-writer
skills.description: Drafts a complete, wire-ready press release in standard inverted-pyramid format — headline, dateline, body copy, boilerplate, and media contact block — based on the key facts you provide.

skills.name: production-status-update-writer
skills.description: Writes a clear, professional status update on a media production for commissioners, editors, funders, or executive stakeholders who need to know where a project stands without reading through internal working documents.

skills.name: source-followup-email-writer
skills.description: Writes a professional, strategically crafted follow-up email to a source or interview subject who has not responded to an initial outreach, calibrated to the relationship, the urgency, and how many times you have already followed up.

skills.name: source-pitch-email-writer
skills.description: Drafts a professional, personalised pitch email to a potential interviewee or expert source, clearly explaining why you are reaching out, what the story is about, and what you are asking them to do.

skills.name: speaker-notes-writer
skills.description: Writes full speaker notes for each slide in a conference or panel presentation, giving the speaker natural, spoken-word language that expands on the slide content without simply reading it aloud.

skills.name: ab-title-test-brief
skills.description: Generates 4–5 distinct title variants for A/B testing on a YouTube video, each testing a different click psychology principle, with a rationale for each variant and a recommended testing hypothesis.

skills.name: performance-report-writer
skills.description: Writes a structured monthly or quarterly YouTube channel performance report from raw analytics data, with metric summaries, trend observations, and specific next-step recommendations.

skills.name: brand-deal-pitch-writer
skills.description: Writes a professional brand partnership pitch email to a prospective sponsor, presenting the channel's audience, relevant metrics, and specific integration options in a format that a marketing or partnerships team will take seriously.

skills.name: sponsorship-email-writer
skills.description: Writes a professional, specific sponsorship proposal email for a defined YouTube integration type — dedicated video, mid-roll mention, or product placement — addressed to a brand's marketing or partnerships contact.

skills.name: youtube-media-kit-generator
skills.description: Generates the complete text content for a YouTube channel media kit — the document brands use to evaluate a creator before committing to a partnership — structured as a ready-to-design one or two-page document.

skills.name: audience-persona-builder
skills.description: Generates a detailed, practical audience persona profile for a YouTube channel — covering who the viewer is, what they need, why they watch, and what content decisions follow from understanding them.

skills.name: content-calendar-planner
skills.description: Builds a realistic 4-week content calendar for a YouTube channel, with specific video topics, formats, publishing dates, and strategic notes for each upload.

skills.name: chapter-timestamps
skills.description: Generates a clean, correctly formatted YouTube chapter timestamp list from a video script, outline, or finished transcript.

skills.name: community-post-generator
skills.description: Writes an engaging YouTube Community tab post to promote a new video upload, tease upcoming content, or spark audience conversation — matched to the channel's voice.

skills.name: description-seo-writer
skills.description: Writes a complete, SEO-optimized YouTube video description — including hook paragraph, keyword-rich body, structured links section, and hashtags — ready to paste into YouTube Studio.

skills.name: hook-generator
skills.description: Write three opening hook options — one per style — for a YouTube video, podcast intro, or documentary opening.

skills.name: niche-video-idea-generator
skills.description: Generates 10 targeted video ideas for a specific YouTube niche, each with a working title, one-sentence hook, and content angle suited to the channel's style and audience.

skills.name: seo-title-optimizer
skills.description: Generates 8–10 search-optimized YouTube title options for a given video topic, ranked by click-through and discoverability potential.

skills.name: thumbnail-concept-brief
skills.description: Produces a detailed, production-ready thumbnail concept brief that a designer or self-producing creator can execute without further instruction.

skills.name: b-roll-shot-list
skills.description: Generates a detailed, numbered B-roll shot list from a video script or outline, organized by section, with shot type, subject, and purpose for each shot.

skills.name: call-to-action-generator
skills.description: Writes multiple ready-to-record CTA script options for subscribe, like, comment, sponsor read, or channel promotion — matched to a channel's tone and placed at the right moment in a video.

skills.name: full-script-writer
skills.description: Writes a complete, word-for-word YouTube video script — from opening hook through outro — based on a title, content angle, and key talking points.

skills.name: shorts-script-adapter
skills.description: Adapts a section of a long-form YouTube video script into a punchy, self-contained YouTube Shorts script under 60 seconds, optimized for vertical format and the Shorts feed.
